dashboard.title: Good day
dashboard.subtitle: Here is an overview of your financial situation.

payslip.title: Payslip Explainer
payslip.subtitle: Enter your gross salary and see exactly what you take home — step by step.

taxPlanner.title: Tax Planner
taxPlanner.subtitle: Calculate your deductions and find out what you can deduct.

deductions.title: Your deductions
deductions.daycareNotice: Daycare deduction calculated automatically from your profile.

oresund.notice: You are an Øresund commuter — special tax rules apply
oresund.rateNote: We use the national average municipality rate (25.1%) as an estimate. Consult SKAT or a tax advisor for your exact figure.
oresund.cta: Under the Nordic double-taxation convention, Øresund commuters are typically taxed in Denmark.

goals.title: Financial Goals
goals.subtitle: Set and track your goals.
goals.noGoals: You have no active goals yet.

recommendations.title: Your Personal Plan
recommendations.subtitle: Tailored to exactly the goals you have set
recommendations.noGoals: Add goals above to see your personalised plan.

partners.disclaimer: Bullaris has no commercial relationship with any of these partners — recommendations are based solely on relevance to your goals.

webinars.disclaimer: Webinars are free for all Bullaris users. You will receive a confirmation email with a Zoom link.

horizons.shortDesc: Liquidity first. Eliminate high-interest debt before investing — the return is guaranteed and risk-free.
horizons.mediumDesc: Concrete life goals. Match your savings vehicle to the time horizon (Shefrin & Statman, 2000).
horizons.longDesc: Compound growth and tax advantages. Bengen's 4% rule applies from 30+ year horizons.

celebration.title: You reached your goal! 🎉
celebration.subtitle: A big step forward. What's next?

chat.title: AI Finance Assistant
chat.subtitle: Ask questions about your salary, taxes, and finances. Max 20 messages per day.
chat.disclaimer: The AI assistant provides financial knowledge — not investment advice. Consult an advisor for important decisions.
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm your financial assistant. Ask me about your payslip, deductions, pension, or anything about your finances.

suggestions.aSkat: How is my income tax calculated?

errors.dailyLimit: Daily message limit reached. Visit the Learning Library for more resources.
errors.network: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

learning.title: Learning Library
learning.subtitle: Learn about Danish tax, pension, and personal finance at your own pace.

portal.title: HR Portal
portal.subtitle: All figures are anonymised aggregates. Minimum 5 employees per group.
portal.privacyNotice: You only see anonymised aggregates. Individual employee data is never visible here.
portal.privacyGuarantee: Bullaris never shows individual employee data in the HR portal. All aggregates require a minimum of 5 employees.

employees.title: Employees
employees.subtitle: Invite employees and view onboarding status. No financial data is shown here.

invite.title: Invite employee
invite.description: Employees receive a magic link and set up their own profile.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Anonymised aggregates for your organisation.
analytics.privacyThresholdNotice: Data is only shown when the group has at least 5 employees.
analytics.wellbeingTrend: Monthly average from pulse survey (1–5). Shown only when ≥5 responses.

pulse.question: How financially confident do you feel this month?

seats.title: Seats
seats.subtitle: Overview of your seat subscription and usage.
seats.upgradeDesc: Contact us to upgrade your subscription and give more employees access.

nudges.title: Nudge Campaigns
nudges.subtitle: Send targeted messages to all employees at a scheduled time.
nudges.subject: Subject

finance.title: Your Finances
finance.subtitle: Budget, debt, net worth, and financial health — all in one place.

debt.label: Name
debt.avalancheDesc: Pay highest-interest debt first — saves the most in total interest.
debt.snowballDesc: Pay smallest balance first — builds momentum and motivation.

netWorth.privacy: Only you can see these figures — never your HR department.

step2.title: Your situation
step2.hasChildren: Do you have children in daycare or SFO?

onboarding.municipality: Which municipality do you live in?
onboarding.daycareNote: Entitles you to a daycare deduction (SKAT 2026: up to DKK 6,400/child, max 2 children)

consent.versionNotice: You can withdraw your consent at any time under Settings.

errors.unauthorized: You do not have access to this page.

errors.consentRequired: Consent is required to use this module.

meta.title: Bullaris — Employee Financial Wellness for Danish Workplaces
meta.description: Help your employees feel confident about their finances. Bullaris gives HR teams a GDPR-compliant financial wellness platform built for Danish SMEs.

hero.subheadline: Financial stress is the #1 hidden drag on engagement and retention. Bullaris gives HR teams the tools to actually do something about it — without adding complexity to your benefits stack.
hero.cta: Take the free Financial Stress Audit →

stats.source: Sources: Finansforbundet 2023, PwC Global Workforce Survey 2024, Velliv Association 2023
stats.c1label: of employees report financial stress affects their work
stats.c2label: higher retention in companies with financial wellness programs
stats.c3label: of sick days in Denmark linked to financial stress

marketing.peopleStrip: Built for Danish workplaces. Designed with HR teams across retail, tech, construction, and healthcare.

howItWorks.h2: How Bullaris works for HR teams
howItWorks.headline: Simple for HR. Meaningful for employees.
howItWorks.subheadline: No complex integrations. No extra admin. Up and running in one afternoon.
howItWorks.step1title: You set it up in an afternoon
howItWorks.step1desc: Connect your payroll data or enter headcount manually. No IT department required. GDPR-compliant from day one.
howItWorks.step2desc: Each employee gets a private dashboard: net salary decoder, emergency fund tracker, and total compensation view. Completely confidential — you never see individual data.
howItWorks.step3desc: Anonymised, aggregated insights for your HR dashboard. Track financial wellbeing as an engagement metric alongside eNPS and absenteeism.

pricing.headline: Transparent pricing. No surprises.
pricing.label: Per employee, per month
pricing.subtext: Billed annually · Minimum 10 seats · Includes all features + dedicated onboarding
pricing.below: All plans include a free 30-day pilot. No credit card required.

finalCta.headline: Start with a 5-minute audit.
finalCta.subheadline: Find out exactly where your employees stand — and what it's costing your organisation.
finalCta.reassurance: Free. Anonymous for employees. No commitment required.

footer.tagline: Employee financial wellness for Danish workplaces
footer.bottom: Bullaris ApS · CVR: XXXXXXXX · EU servers · GDPR compliant
